title: Spanish Crumble Dessert
description: A sweet Spanish-inspired dessert featuring gooey and crumbly toppings with a hint of vanilla.
instructions: Bake the vanilla cake according to the package instructions.
While the cake is baking, prepare the Spanish almond crumble by mixing together crushed almonds and sugar.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Drizzle the gooey caramel sauce over the top of the cake.
Sprinkle the Spanish almond crumble over the top of the cake.
Return the cake to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
